seoTitle: Point Leo vs Point Lonsdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Leo and Point Lonsdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Leo vs Point Lonsdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Leo and Point Lonsdale.
heading: Point Leo vs Point Lonsdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Leo, Victoria and Point Lonsdale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Lonsdale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Point Leo (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Leo or Point Lonsdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Leo has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Point Lonsdale scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Leo scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Point Lonsdale scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Leo or Point Lonsdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Lonsdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
